prompt: An indoor inspection drone autonomously navigates a multi-floor factory. It must spend no more than 120 seconds in each section. If temperature exceeds 60°C, the drone activates thermal protection and skips the current section. In case of lost localization, it switches to mapping mode until position is reacquired. When all sections are inspected, it must land at the maintenance dock and upload sensor logs. It is always possible to reach a safe state where the drone is landed.
constraints: If temperature exceeds 60°C, InspectDrone must activate thermal protection
InspectDrone switches to mapping mode if localization lost
InspectDrone lands at maintenance dock after all sections inspected
InspectDrone uploads sensor logs after landing
Always possible to reach safe landed state
